rationale: Test asserts all three invariants: count equality, (partition,offset) uniqueness, and strictly monotonic per-partition offsets. 3 partitions enforced, 30s budget, #[ignore] gates --ignored execution as required.

findings.summary: Uses 3,000 messages instead of the 10k example; bead phrasing 'e.g. 10k' permits this and keeps the run inside the 30s CI budget on debug builds.
Monotonicity is checked in delivery order, which for a single consumer on rdkafka equals broker offset order per partition; acceptable for the AC.
